original_image_tags: The word "COPY" is stamped in red ink in an outline font across the bottom two lines of the text.

elements.description: Page 2 of a typed document describing an aerial observation near Mt. Rainier. Contains a red 'COPY' stamp at the bottom.

judge.reason: Description A claims a specific red 'COPY' stamp in outline font across the bottom two lines of text, while Description B only states a red 'COPY' stamp at the bottom without specifying the outline font detail, creating a direct contradiction on the visual detail of the stamp's typography.
